<permissions instructions>
Filesystem sandboxing defines which files can be read or written. `sandbox_mode` is `danger-full-access`: No filesystem sandboxing - all commands are permitted. Network access is enabled.
Approval policy is currently never. Do not provide the `sandbox_permissions` for any reason, commands will be rejected.
</permissions instructions><skills_instructions>
## Skills
A skill is a set of local instructions to follow that is stored in a `SKILL.md` file. Below is the list of skills that can be used. Each entry includes a name, description, and file path so you can open the source for full instructions when using a specific skill.
### Available skills
- imagegen: Generate or edit raster images when the task benefits from AI-created bitmap visuals such as photos, illustrations, textures, sprites, mockups, or transparent-background cutouts. Use when Codex should create a brand-new image, transform an existing image, or derive visual variants from references, and the output should be a bitmap asset rather than repo-native code or vector. Do not use when the task is better handled by editing existing SVG/vector/code-native assets, extending an established icon or logo system, or building the visual directly in HTML/CSS/canvas. (file: /tmp/codex-home/skills/.system/imagegen/SKILL.md)
- openai-docs: Use when the user asks how to build with OpenAI products or APIs, asks about Codex itself or choosing Codex surfaces, needs up-to-date official documentation with citations, help choosing the latest model for a use case, or model upgrade and prompt-upgrade guidance; use OpenAI docs MCP tools for non-Codex docs questions, use the Codex manual helper first for broad Codex self-knowledge, and restrict fallback browsing to official OpenAI domains. (file: /tmp/codex-home/skills/.system/openai-docs/SKILL.md)
- plugin-creator: Create and scaffold plugin directories for Codex with a required `.codex-plugin/plugin.json`, optional plugin folders/files, valid manifest defaults, and personal-marketplace entries by default. Use when Codex needs to create a new personal plugin, add optional plugin structure, generate or update marketplace entries for plugin ordering and availability metadata, or update an existing local plugin during development with the CLI-driven cachebuster and reinstall flow. (file: /tmp/codex-home/skills/.system/plugin-creator/SKILL.md)
- skill-creator: Guide for creating effective skills. This skill should be used when users want to create a new skill (or update an existing skill) that extends Codex's capabilities with specialized knowledge, workflows, or tool integrations. (file: /tmp/codex-home/skills/.system/skill-creator/SKILL.md)
- skill-installer: Install Codex skills into $CODEX_HOME/skills from a curated list or a GitHub repo path. Use when a user asks to list installable skills, install a curated skill, or install a skill from another repo (including private repos). (file: /tmp/codex-home/skills/.system/skill-installer/SKILL.md)
### How to use skills
- Discovery: The list above is the skills available in this session (name + description + file path). Skill bodies live on disk at the listed paths.
- Trigger rules: If the user names a skill (with `$SkillName` or plain text) OR the task clearly matches a skill's description shown above, you must use that skill for that turn. Multiple mentions mean use them all. Do not carry skills across turns unless re-mentioned.
- Missing/blocked: If a named skill isn't in the list or the path can't be read, say so briefly and continue with the best fallback.
- How to use a skill (progressive disclosure):
  1) After deciding to use a skill, open its `SKILL.md`. Read only enough to follow the workflow.
  2) When `SKILL.md` references relative paths (e.g., `scripts/foo.py`), resolve them relative to the skill directory listed above first, and only consider other paths if needed.
  3) If `SKILL.md` points to extra folders such as `references/`, load only the specific files needed for the request; don't bulk-load everything.
  4) If `scripts/` exist, prefer running or patching them instead of retyping large code blocks.
  5) If `assets/` or templates exist, reuse them instead of recreating from scratch.
- Coordination and sequencing:
  - If multiple skills apply, choose the minimal set that covers the request and state the order you'll use them.
  - Announce which skill(s) you're using and why (one short line). If you skip an obvious skill, say why.
- Context hygiene:
  - Keep context small: summarize long sections instead of pasting them; only load extra files when needed.
  - Avoid deep reference-chasing: prefer opening only files directly linked from `SKILL.md` unless you're blocked.
  - When variants exist (frameworks, providers, domains), pick only the relevant reference file(s) and note that choice.
- Safety and fallback: If a skill can't be applied cleanly (missing files, unclear instructions), state the issue, pick the next-best approach, and continue.
</skills_instructions>

# Machinery Malfunctions

Using the available data, identify which technicians are responsible for maintenance-caused quality rejections, and list the products affected by each such technician.

Context:
- Machines produce batches over time and carry a persistent technical condition that is not directly recorded in any table.
- A maintenance event may improve the machine, leave it unchanged, or introduce a hidden fault. Hidden faults are never labeled as such in the data.
- A hidden fault affects later batches produced on the same machine until a subsequent maintenance event changes the machine state.
- A given fault class may affect only some products. A technician can therefore be responsible for quality issues on one product while leaving other products on the same machine unaffected.
- Quality inspection happens with a delay, so inspection date is not the same as production date.
- Defects also arise from unrelated factors and natural variation that must be ruled out.

Linking a rejected batch to a maintenance event:
A batch can be attributed to one specific maintenance event only when all three hold:
  a) the batch was produced on the machine that the technician serviced,
  b) production started after that maintenance was completed,
  c) production started before the next maintenance event on the same machine.

Confirming a technician:
A technician is confirmed only if their own maintenance work can be linked to at least 3 distinct rejected batches, distributed across at least 2 different work orders performed by that same technician.
Technicians below either threshold are isolated cases and must be excluded.

Reporting products for a confirmed technician:
Once a technician is confirmed, include every product for which at least one rejected batch can be causally linked to that technician's faulty maintenance - even if that product-technician pair has only one supporting batch.
Do not include products whose rejections are explained by non-maintenance factors, or for which no link to a confirmed technician exists.

Dataset:
- The generated CSV files are available directly in `/app/`.
- Raw service reports are available under `/app/raw_service_reports/`.

Answer format:
- Write your final answer to `/app/answer.json` using JSON format.
- Use product IDs as object keys.
- Use arrays of technician IDs as values.
- Sort product IDs ascending.
- Sort technician IDs ascending inside each array.
- Omit products with no confirmed responsible technician.

Example:
```json
{"P_004": ["TECH_013", "TECH_016"], "P_005": ["TECH_001"]}
```
I’m tracing the maintenance-to-rejection links from the CSVs and service reports, then I’ll verify the technician thresholds and write the final product-to-technician mapping to `answer.json`.

arguments.cmd: rg --files /app

steps.message: The service reports are just structured notes with machine, technician, work type, and timing, so the hidden-fault signal has to be inferred from outcomes. I’m building the maintenance intervals now and checking how rejected batches cluster by machine, product, and defect code after each service event.

plan.step: Parse service reports and reconstruct maintenance windows per machine
Attribute each production batch to the immediately preceding maintenance event on its machine
Infer which rejections are maintenance-caused, confirm technicians by threshold, and generate answer.json

arguments.cmd:
python - <<'PY'
import pandas as pd
from pathlib import Path
import re

# Parse service reports quickly
records=[]
for p in sorted(Path('/app/raw_service_reports').rglob('*_service.txt')):
    txt=p.read_text().strip().splitlines()
    rec={'report_path': str(p.relative_to('/app'))}
    for line in txt:
        if ': ' in line:
            k,v=line.split(': ',1)
            rec[k.strip()] = v.strip()
    records.append(rec)
svc=pd.DataFrame(records)
svc=svc.rename(columns={'DAY':'day','WORK ORDER':'work_order_id','MACHINE':'machine_id','TECHNICIAN':'technician_id','WORK TYPE':'work_type','REPORTED REASON':'reported_reason','STARTED':'started','COMPLETED':'completed','FINAL STATUS':'final_status'})
print('service rows', svc.shape)
print(svc.head().to_string(index=False))

b=pd.read_csv('/app/production_batches.csv')
q=pd.read_csv('/app/quality_inspections.csv')
a=pd.read_csv('/app/machine_assignment_log.csv')
prod=pd.read_csv('/app/products.csv')

# basic rejects
qi=q.merge(prod[['product_id','quality_rejection_threshold_pct']], on='product_id', how='left')
print('inspection results counts')
print(qi['inspection_result'].value_counts().to_string())
print('rejected by threshold mismatch', ((qi['inspection_result']=='REJECTED') != (qi['rejected_pct']>qi['quality_rejection_threshold_pct'])).sum())
print('overall reject rate', (qi['inspection_result']=='REJECTED').mean())
print('defect counts top20')
print(qi.loc[qi['inspection_result']=='REJECTED','defect_code'].value_counts().head(20).to_string())

# maintenance counts per machine
print('machines with maintenance counts summary')
print(svc['machine_id'].value_counts().describe().to_string())

# batches per machine summary
print('batches per machine summary')
print(b['machine_id'].value_counts().describe().to_string())

# days range
print('day ranges maintenance', svc['day'].astype(int).min(), svc['day'].astype(int).max())
print('day ranges production', b['production_day'].min(), b['production_day'].max())
print('day ranges inspection', q['inspection_day'].min(), q['inspection_day'].max())

PY

print('day ranges inspection', q['inspection_day'].min(), q['inspection_day'].max())

python - <<'PY'
import pandas as pd
from pathlib import Path

# parse service reports
records=[]
for p in sorted(Path('/app/raw_service_reports').rglob('*_service.txt')):
    rec={'report_path': str(p.relative_to('/app'))}
    for line in p.read_text().splitlines():
        if ': ' in line:
            k,v=line.split(': ',1)
            rec[k.strip()] = v.strip()
    records.append(rec)
svc=pd.DataFrame(records).rename(columns={'DAY':'day','WORK ORDER':'work_order_id','MACHINE':'machine_id','TECHNICIAN':'technician_id','WORK TYPE':'work_type','REPORTED REASON':'reported_reason','STARTED':'started','COMPLETED':'completed','FINAL STATUS':'final_status'})
svc['day']=svc['day'].astype(int)

def t2m(s):
    h,m=map(int,s.split(':'))
    return h*60+m
svc['start_min']=svc['started'].map(t2m)
svc['completed_min']=svc['completed'].map(t2m)
svc['completed_ts']=(svc['day']-1)*1440+svc['completed_min']
svc['start_ts']=(svc['day']-1)*1440+svc['start_min']
svc=svc.sort_values(['machine_id','completed_ts','work_order_id']).reset_index(drop=True)
svc['next_completed_ts']=svc.groupby('machine_id')['completed_ts'].shift(-1)
svc['next_start_ts']=svc.groupby('machine_id')['start_ts'].shift(-1)

b=pd.read_csv('/app/production_batches.csv')
a=pd.read_csv('/app/machine_assignment_log.csv')
q=pd.read_csv('/app/quality_inspections.csv')
prod=pd.read_csv('/app/products.csv')

jobs=b.merge(a[['job_id','day','machine_id','start_time','end_time']], on=['job_id','machine_id'], how='left')
jobs['start_min']=jobs['start_time'].map(t2m)
jobs['start_ts']=(jobs['production_day']-1)*1440+jobs['start_min']
jobs=jobs.sort_values(['machine_id','start_ts','batch_id']).reset_index(drop=True)

# merge_asof by machine
parts=[]
for m, dfm in jobs.groupby('machine_id', sort=False):
    svcm=svc[svc['machine_id']==m][['work_order_id','technician_id','machine_id','completed_ts','next_completed_ts','next_start_ts','work_type','reported_reason','day']].sort_values('completed_ts')
    if svcm.empty:
        dfm=dfm.copy(); dfm[['work_order_id','technician_id','completed_ts','next_completed_ts','next_start_ts','work_type','reported_reason','maint_day']]=pd.NA
    else:
        dfm=pd.merge_asof(dfm.sort_values('start_ts'), svcm.rename(columns={'day':'maint_day'}), left_on='start_ts', right_on='completed_ts', direction='backward')
    parts.append(dfm)
attr=pd.concat(parts, ignore_index=True)
# valid link should have prior maintenance and production start before next maintenance event (use next_start if available else no upper bound)
attr['linked_prev_completed']=attr['completed_ts'].notna() & (attr['start_ts']>attr['completed_ts'])
attr['before_next_start']=attr['next_start_ts'].isna() | (attr['start_ts']<attr['next_start_ts'])
attr['link_ok']=attr['linked_prev_completed'] & attr['before_next_start']
attr=attr.merge(q[['batch_id','inspection_day','rejected_pct','defect_code','inspection_result']], on='batch_id', how='left')
attr=attr.merge(prod[['product_id','quality_rejection_threshold_pct']], on='product_id', how='left')
attr['is_rejected']=attr['inspection_result'].eq('REJECTED')
print('all batches linked to maintenance', attr['link_ok'].mean(), attr['link_ok'].sum(), 'of', len(attr))
print('rejected linked', attr.loc[attr['is_rejected'],'link_ok'].mean(), attr.loc[attr['is_rejected'],'link_ok'].sum(), 'of', attr['is_rejected'].sum())

rej=attr[attr['is_rejected'] & attr['link_ok']].copy()
print('\nRejected batches by technician (top 20)')
print(rej['technician_id'].value_counts().head(20).to_string())
print('\nRejected batches by work order (top 30)')
print(rej['work_order_id'].value_counts().head(30).to_string())
print('\nTechnician distinct work orders with any linked rejection (top 20)')
print(rej.groupby('technician_id')['work_order_id'].nunique().sort_values(ascending=False).head(20).to_string())
print('\nTop technician/product rejected counts')
print(rej.groupby(['technician_id','product_id']).size().sort_values(ascending=False).head(40).to_string())
print('\nTop machine/product rejected counts')
print(rej.groupby(['machine_id','product_id']).size().sort_values(ascending=False).head(40).to_string())
print('\nTop defect/product rejected counts')
print(rej.groupby(['defect_code','product_id']).size().sort_values(ascending=False).head(40).to_string())
PY

import pandas as pd
from pathlib import Path

# parse service reports
records=[]
for p in sorted(Path('/app/raw_service_reports').rglob('*_service.txt')):
    rec={'report_path': str(p.relative_to('/app'))}
    for line in p.read_text().splitlines():
        if ': ' in line:
            k,v=line.split(': ',1)
            rec[k.strip()] = v.strip()
    records.append(rec)
svc=pd.DataFrame(records).rename(columns={'DAY':'day','WORK ORDER':'work_order_id','MACHINE':'machine_id','TECHNICIAN':'technician_id','WORK TYPE':'work_type','REPORTED REASON':'reported_reason','STARTED':'started','COMPLETED':'completed','FINAL STATUS':'final_status'})
svc['day']=svc['day'].astype(int)

def t2m(s):
    h,m=map(int,s.split(':'))
    return h*60+m
svc['start_min']=svc['started'].map(t2m)
svc['completed_min']=svc['completed'].map(t2m)
svc['completed_ts']=(svc['day']-1)*1440+svc['completed_min']
svc['start_ts']=(svc['day']-1)*1440+svc['start_min']
svc=svc.sort_values(['machine_id','completed_ts','work_order_id']).reset_index(drop=True)
svc['next_start_ts']=svc.groupby('machine_id')['start_ts'].shift(-1)

b=pd.read_csv('/app/production_batches.csv')
a=pd.read_csv('/app/machine_assignment_log.csv')
q=pd.read_csv('/app/quality_inspections.csv')

jobs=b.merge(a[['job_id','day','machine_id','start_time','end_time','sequence_on_machine']], on=['job_id','machine_id'], how='left')
jobs['start_min']=jobs['start_time'].map(t2m)
jobs['start_ts']=(jobs['production_day']-1)*1440+jobs['start_min']
parts=[]
for m, dfm in jobs.groupby('machine_id', sort=False):
    svcm=svc[svc['machine_id']==m][['work_order_id','technician_id','machine_id','completed_ts','next_start_ts','work_type','reported_reason','day']].sort_values('completed_ts')
    if svcm.empty:
        dfm=dfm.copy(); dfm[['work_order_id','technician_id','completed_ts','next_start_ts','work_type','reported_reason','maint_day']]=pd.NA
    else:
        dfm=pd.merge_asof(dfm.sort_values('start_ts'), svcm.rename(columns={'day':'maint_day'}), left_on='start_ts', right_on='completed_ts', direction='backward')
    parts.append(dfm)
attr=pd.concat(parts, ignore_index=True)
attr['link_ok']=attr['completed_ts'].notna() & (attr['start_ts']>attr['completed_ts']) & (attr['next_start_ts'].isna() | (attr['start_ts']<attr['next_start_ts']))
attr=attr.merge(q[['batch_id','inspection_day','rejected_pct','defect_code','inspection_result']], on='batch_id', how='left')
attr['is_rejected']=attr['inspection_result'].eq('REJECTED')

rej=attr[attr['is_rejected']].copy()
# event stats
interval_stats=attr[attr['link_ok']].groupby(['work_order_id','technician_id','machine_id','maint_day','product_id']).agg(
    batches=('batch_id','size'),
    rejects=('is_rejected','sum'),
    defect_modes=('defect_code', lambda s: s.mode().iat[0] if not s.mode().empty else None),
    mean_reject_pct=('rejected_pct','mean')
).reset_index()
# top event-product rejects
print('Top work_order/product reject counts')
print(interval_stats[interval_stats['rejects']>0].sort_values(['rejects','batches'], ascending=[False,False]).head(60).to_string(index=False))

# overall by product/defect for rejected batches
print('\nRejected counts by product')
print(rej['product_id'].value_counts().head(30).to_string())
print('\nRejected counts by product+defect top 50')
print(rej.groupby(['product_id','defect_code']).size().sort_values(ascending=False).head(50).to_string())
print('\nRejected counts by machine+defect top 50')
print(rej.groupby(['machine_id_x','defect_code']).size().sort_values(ascending=False).head(50).to_string())

jobs['start_ts']=(jobs['production_day']-1)*1440+jobs['start_time'].map(t2m)

for m, dfm in jobs.groupby('machine_id', sort=False):

    dfm=dfm.sort_values('start_ts').copy()
    if svcm.empty:
        for c in ['work_order_id','technician_id','completed_ts','next_start_ts','work_type','reported_reason','maint_day']:

attr=attr.merge(q[['batch_id','inspection_day','rejected_pct','defect_code','inspection_result']], on='batch_id', how='left')
attr=attr.merge(prod[['product_id','quality_rejection_threshold_pct']], on='product_id', how='left')
attr['is_rejected']=attr['inspection_result'].eq('REJECTED')

# suspicious batches: rejected and link_ok

    machines=('machine_id','nunique'),
    work_orders_list=('work_order_id', lambda s: ','.join(sorted(s.unique())[:10])),
    machine_list=('machine_id', lambda s: ','.join(sorted(s.unique())[:10]))
).reset_index().sort_values(['batches','work_orders'], ascending=False)
print(summ.head(120).to_string(index=False))

svc['prev_work_order_id']=svc.groupby('machine_id')['work_order_id'].shift(1)
svc['next_work_order_id']=svc.groupby('machine_id')['work_order_id'].shift(-1)
svc['prev_technician_id']=svc.groupby('machine_id')['technician_id'].shift(1)
svc['next_technician_id']=svc.groupby('machine_id')['technician_id'].shift(-1)

b=pd.read_csv('/app/production_batches.csv')

jobs['start_ts']=(jobs['production_day']-1)*1440+jobs['start_time'].map(t2m)
parts=[]
for m, dfm in jobs.groupby('machine_id', sort=False):
    svcm=svc[svc['machine_id']==m][['work_order_id','technician_id','completed_ts','next_start_ts','day']].sort_values('completed_ts')
    dfm=dfm.sort_values('start_ts').copy()
    if svcm.empty:
        for c in ['work_order_id','technician_id','completed_ts','next_start_ts','maint_day']:

    else:

    parts.append(dfm)

attr['link_ok']=attr['completed_ts'].notna() & (attr['start_ts']>attr['completed_ts']) & (attr['next_start_ts'].isna() | (attr['start_ts']<attr['next_start_ts']))
attr=attr.merge(q[['batch_id','inspection_day','rejected_pct','defect_code','inspection_result']], on='batch_id', how='left')
attr['is_rejected']=attr['inspection_result'].eq('REJECTED')

sus_wos=['WO_001001','WO_002218','WO_002741','WO_000105','WO_000154','WO_000338','WO_000423','WO_001879','WO_002225','WO_002616','WO_002698','WO_002802','WO_002855','WO_002906','WO_003046','WO_001679','WO_002203','WO_002869','WO_002928']
for wo in sus_wos:
    s=svc.loc[svc['work_order_id']==wo].iloc[0]
    print('\n===',wo,s['technician_id'],s['machine_id'],'day',s['day'],'prev',s['prev_work_order_id'],s['prev_technician_id'],'next',s['next_work_order_id'],s['next_technician_id'],'===')
    df=attr[(attr['work_order_id']==wo)&(attr['link_ok'])].copy()
    if df.empty:
        print('no batches')
        continue
    grp=df.groupby('product_id').agg(batches=('batch_id','size'), rejects=('is_rejected','sum'), avg_pct=('rejected_pct','mean'), defect_codes=('defect_code', lambda s: ','.join(sorted(s.unique())))).sort_values(['rejects','batches'], ascending=False)
    print(grp.to_string())
    print('rejected batch details:')
    print(df[df['is_rejected']][['production_day','start_time','batch_id','product_id','rejected_pct','defect_code']].to_string(index=False))

extra.raw_arguments:
{"cmd":"python - <<'PY'
import pandas as pd
from pathlib import Path

# parse service reports
records=[]
for p in sorted(Path('/app/raw_service_reports').rglob('*_service.txt')):
    rec={}
    for line in p.read_text().splitlines():
        if ': ' in line:
            k,v=line.split(': ',1)
            rec[k.strip()] = v.strip()
    records.append(rec)
svc=pd.DataFrame(records).rename(columns={'DAY':'day','WORK ORDER':'work_order_id','MACHINE':'machine_id','TECHNICIAN':'technician_id','WORK TYPE':'work_type','REPORTED_REA?':'reported_reason','REPORTED REASON':'reported_reason','STARTED':'started','COMPLETED':'completed','FINAL STATUS':'final_status'})
svc['day']=svc['day'].astype(int)

def t2m(s):
    h,m=map(int,s.split(':'))
    return h*60+m
svc['start_ts']=(svc['day']-1)*1440+svc['started'].map(t2m)
svc['completed_ts']=(svc['day']-1)*1440+svc['completed'].map(t2m)
svc=svc.sort_values(['machine_id','completed_ts','work_order_id']).reset_index(drop=True)
svc['next_start_ts']=svc.groupby('machine_id')['start_ts'].shift(-1)
svc['prev_work_order_id']=svc.groupby('machine_id')['work_order_id'].shift(1)
svc['next_work_order_id']=svc.groupby('machine_id')['work_order_id'].shift(-1)
svc['prev_technician_id']=svc.groupby('machine_id')['technician_id'].shift(1)
svc['next_technician_id']=svc.groupby('machine_id')['technician_id'].shift(-1)

b=pd.read_csv('/app/production_batches.csv')
a=pd.read_csv('/app/machine_assignment_log.csv')
q=pd.read_csv('/app/quality_inspections.csv')

jobs=b.merge(a[['job_id','machine_id','start_time','end_time','sequence_on_machine']], on=['job_id','machine_id'], how='left')
jobs['start_ts']=(jobs['production_day']-1)*1440+jobs['start_time'].map(t2m)
parts=[]
for m, dfm in jobs.groupby('machine_id', sort=False):
    svcm=svc[svc['machine_id']==m][['work_order_id','technician_id','completed_ts','next_start_ts','day']].sort_values('completed_ts')
    dfm=dfm.sort_values('start_ts').copy()
    if svcm.empty:
        for c in ['work_order_id','technician_id','completed_ts','next_start_ts','maint_day']:
            dfm[c]=pd.NA
    else:
        dfm=pd.merge_asof(dfm, svcm.rename(columns={'day':'maint_day'}), left_on='start_ts', right_on='completed_ts', direction='backward')
    parts.append(dfm)
attr=pd.concat(parts, ignore_index=True)
attr['link_ok']=attr['completed_ts'].notna() & (attr['start_ts']>attr['completed_ts']) & (attr['next_start_ts'].isna() | (attr['start_ts']<attr['next_start_ts']))
attr=attr.merge(q[['batch_id','inspection_day','rejected_pct','defect_code','inspection_result']], on='batch_id', how='left')
attr['is_rejected']=attr['inspection_result'].eq('REJECTED')

sus_wos=['WO_001001','WO_002218','WO_002741','WO_000105','WO_000154','WO_000338','WO_000423','WO_001879','WO_002225','WO_002616','WO_002698','WO_002802','WO_002855','WO_002906','WO_003046','WO_001679','WO_002203','WO_002869','WO_002928']
for wo in sus_wos:
    s=svc.loc[svc['work_order_id']==wo].iloc[0]
    print('\n===',wo,s['technician_id'],s['machine_id'],'day',s['day'],'prev',s['prev_work_order_id'],s['prev_technician_id'],'next',s['next_work_order_id'],s['next_technician_id'],'===')
    df=attr[(attr['work_order_id']==wo)&(attr['link_ok'])].copy()
    if df.empty:
        print('no batches')
        continue
    grp=df.groupby('product_id').agg(batches=('batch_id','size'), rejects=('is_rejected','sum'), avg_pct=('rejected_pct','mean'), defect_codes=('defect_code', lambda s: ','.join(sorted(s.unique())))).sort_values(['rejects','batches'], ascending=False)
    print(grp.to_string())
    print('rejected batch details:')
    print(df[df['is_rejected']][['production_day','start_time','batch_id','product_id','rejected_pct','defect_code']].to_string(index=False))
PY","workdir":"/app","max_output_tokens":20000}

steps.message: The fault signature is becoming clear: in the strongest cases, one serviced machine starts rejecting every batch of a specific product at a much higher defect rate, while other products on that same machine stay normal until the next maintenance. I’m enumerating all intervals with that signature so I can separate genuine faulty work orders from ordinary scatter.

arguments.cmd:
python - <<'PY'
import pandas as pd
from pathlib import Path

# parse service reports
records=[]
for p in sorted(Path('/app/raw_service_reports').rglob('*_service.txt')):
    rec={}
    for line in p.read_text().splitlines():
        if ': ' in line:
            k,v=line.split(': ',1)
            rec[k.strip()] = v.strip()
    records.append(rec)
svc=pd.DataFrame(records).rename(columns={'DAY':'day','WORK ORDER':'work_order_id','MACHINE':'machine_id','TECHNICIAN':'technician_id','WORK TYPE':'work_type','REPORTED REASON':'reported_reason','STARTED':'started','COMPLETED':'completed','FINAL STATUS':'final_status'})
svc['day']=svc['day'].astype(int)

def t2m(s):
    h,m=map(int,s.split(':'))
    return h*60+m
svc['start_ts']=(svc['day']-1)*1440+svc['started'].map(t2m)
svc['completed_ts']=(svc['day']-1)*1440+svc['completed'].map(t2m)
svc=svc.sort_values(['machine_id','completed_ts','work_order_id']).reset_index(drop=True)
svc['next_start_ts']=svc.groupby('machine_id')['start_ts'].shift(-1)

b=pd.read_csv('/app/production_batches.csv')
a=pd.read_csv('/app/machine_assignment_log.csv')
q=pd.read_csv('/app/quality_inspections.csv')
prod=pd.read_csv('/app/products.csv')

jobs=b.merge(a[['job_id','machine_id','start_time']], on=['job_id','machine_id'], how='left')
jobs['start_ts']=(jobs['production_day']-1)*1440+jobs['start_time'].map(t2m)
parts=[]
for m, dfm in jobs.groupby('machine_id', sort=False):
    svcm=svc[svc['machine_id']==m][['work_order_id','technician_id','completed_ts','next_start_ts','day']].sort_values('completed_ts')
    dfm=dfm.sort_values('start_ts').copy()
    if svcm.empty:
        for c in ['work_order_id','technician_id','completed_ts','next_start_ts','maint_day']:
            dfm[c]=pd.NA
    else:
        dfm=pd.merge_asof(dfm, svcm.rename(columns={'day':'maint_day'}), left_on='start_ts', right_on='completed_ts', direction='backward')
    parts.append(dfm)
attr=pd.concat(parts, ignore_index=True)
attr['link_ok']=attr['completed_ts'].notna() & (attr['start_ts']>attr['completed_ts']) & (attr['next_start_ts'].isna() | (attr['start_ts']<attr['next_start_ts']))
attr=attr.merge(q[['batch_id','rejected_pct','defect_code','inspection_result']], on='batch_id', how='left')
attr=attr.merge(prod[['product_id','quality_rejection_threshold_pct']], on='product_id', how='left')
attr['is_rejected']=attr['inspection_result'].eq('REJECTED')

interval_stats=attr[attr['link_ok']].groupby(['work_order_id','technician_id','machine_id','maint_day','product_id','quality_rejection_threshold_pct']).agg(
    batches=('batch_id','size'),
    rejects=('is_rejected','sum'),
    avg_pct=('rejected_pct','mean'),
    min_pct=('rejected_pct','min'),
    max_pct=('rejected_pct','max'),
    reject_rate=('is_rejected','mean'),
    reject_defects=('defect_code', lambda s: ','.join(sorted(s[attr.loc[s.index,'is_rejected']].unique())) if (attr.loc[s.index,'is_rejected']).any() else '')
).reset_index()
# product baseline
prod_stats=attr.groupby('product_id').agg(total_batches=('batch_id','size'), total_rejects=('is_rejected','sum'), mean_pct=('rejected_pct','mean'), std_pct=('rejected_pct','std')).reset_index()
interval_stats=interval_stats.merge(prod_stats[['product_id','total_batches','total_rejects','mean_pct','std_pct']], on='product_id', how='left')
interval_stats['pct_over_threshold']=interval_stats['avg_pct']-interval_stats['quality_rejection_threshold_pct']
interval_stats['pct_over_baseline']=interval_stats['avg_pct']-interval_stats['mean_pct']
# show candidate strong intervals
cand=interval_stats[(interval_stats['rejects']>=2) | ((interval_stats['rejects']>=1) & (interval_stats['avg_pct']>interval_stats['quality_rejection_threshold_pct']+0.04))]
print(cand.sort_values(['rejects','reject_rate','pct_over_threshold','batches'], ascending=[False,False,False,False]).to_string(index=False))

    svcm=svc[svc['machine_id']==m][['work_order_id','technician_id','completed_ts','next_start_ts','day']].sort_values('completed_ts')
    dfm=dfm.sort_values('start_ts').copy()
    if svcm.empty:
        for c in ['work_order_id','technician_id','completed_ts','next_start_ts','maint_day']:
            dfm[c]=pd.NA
    else:
        dfm=pd.merge_asof(dfm, svcm.rename(columns={'day':'maint_day'}), left_on='start_ts', right_on='completed_ts', direction='backward')
    parts.append(dfm)
attr=pd.concat(parts, ignore_index=True)
attr['link_ok']=attr['completed_ts'].notna() & (attr['start_ts']>attr['completed_ts']) & (attr['next_start_ts'].isna() | (attr['start_ts']<attr['next_start_ts']))
attr=attr.merge(q[['batch_id','rejected_pct','defect_code','inspection_result']], on='batch_id', how='left')
attr=attr.merge(prod[['product_id','quality_rejection_threshold_pct']], on='product_id', how='left')
attr['is_rejected']=attr['inspection_result'].eq('REJECTED')

interval_stats=attr[attr['link_ok']].groupby(['work_order_id','technician_id','machine_id','maint_day','product_id','quality_rejection_threshold_pct']).agg(
    batches=('batch_id','size'),
    rejects=('is_rejected','sum'),
    avg_pct=('rejected_pct','mean'),
    min_pct=('rejected_pct','min'),
    max_pct=('rejected_pct','max'),
    reject_rate=('is_rejected','mean'),
    reject_defects=('defect_code', lambda s: ','.join(sorted(s[attr.loc[s.index,'is_rejected']].unique())) if (attr.loc[s.index,'is_rejected']).any() else '')
).reset_index()
# product baseline
prod_stats=attr.groupby('product_id').agg(total_batches=('batch_id','size'), total_rejects=('is_rejected','sum'), mean_pct=('rejected_pct','mean'), std_pct=('rejected_pct','std')).reset_index()
interval_stats=interval_stats.merge(prod_stats[['product_id','total_batches','total_rejects','mean_pct','std_pct']], on='product_id', how='left')
interval_stats['pct_over_threshold']=interval_stats['avg_pct']-interval_stats['quality_rejection_threshold_pct']
interval_stats['pct_over_baseline']=interval_stats['avg_pct']-interval_stats['mean_pct']
# show candidate strong intervals
cand=interval_stats[(interval_stats['rejects']>=2) | ((interval_stats['rejects']>=1) & (interval_stats['avg_pct']>interval_stats['quality_rejection_threshold_pct']+0.04))]
print(cand.sort_values(['rejects','reject_rate','pct_over_threshold','batches'], ascending=[False,False,False,False]).to_string(index=False))

import pandas as pd
from pathlib import Path

# common loader
records=[]
for p in sorted(Path('/app/raw_service_reports').rglob('*_service.txt')):
    rec={}
    for line in p.read_text().splitlines():
        if ': ' in line:
            k,v=line.split(': ',1)
            rec[k.strip()] = v.strip()
    records.append(rec)
svc=pd.DataFrame(records).rename(columns={'DAY':'day','WORK ORDER':'work_order_id','MACHINE':'machine_id','TECHNICIAN':'technician_id','WORK TYPE':'work_type','REPORTED REASON':'reported_reason','STARTED':'started','COMPLETED':'completed','FINAL STATUS':'final_status'})
svc['day']=svc['day'].astype(int)

def t2m(s):
    h,m=map(int,s.split(':'))
    return h*60+m
svc['start_ts']=(svc['day']-1)*1440+svc['started'].map(t2m)
svc['completed_ts']=(svc['day']-1)*1440+svc['completed'].map(t2m)
svc=svc.sort_values(['machine_id','completed_ts','work_order_id']).reset_index(drop=True)
svc['next_start_ts']=svc.groupby('machine_id')['start_ts'].shift(-1)
svc['prev_work_order_id']=svc.groupby('machine_id')['work_order_id'].shift(1)
svc['prev_technician_id']=svc.groupby('machine_id')['technician_id'].shift(1)
svc['next_work_order_id']=svc.groupby('machine_id')['work_order_id'].shift(-1)
svc['next_technician_id']=svc.groupby('machine_id')['technician_id'].shift(-1)

b=pd.read_csv('/app/production_batches.csv')
a=pd.read_csv('/app/machine_assignment_log.csv')
q=pd.read_csv('/app/quality_inspections.csv')
prod=pd.read_csv('/app/products.csv')

jobs=b.merge(a[['job_id','machine_id','start_time']], on=['job_id','machine_id'], how='left')
jobs['start_ts']=(jobs['production_day']-1)*1440+jobs['start_time'].map(t2m)
parts=[]
for m, dfm in jobs.groupby('machine_id', sort=False):
    svcm=svc[svc['machine_id']==m][['work_order_id','technician_id','completed_ts','next_start_ts','day']].sort_values('completed_ts')
    dfm=dfm.sort_values('start_ts').copy()
    if svcm.empty:
        for c in ['work_order_id','technician_id','completed_ts','next_start_ts','maint_day']:
            dfm[c]=pd.NA
    else:
        dfm=pd.merge_asof(dfm, svcm.rename(columns={'day':'maint_day'}), left_on='start_ts', right_on='completed_ts', direction='backward')
    parts.append(dfm)
attr=pd.concat(parts, ignore_index=True)
attr['link_ok']=attr['completed_ts'].notna() & (attr['start_ts']>attr['completed_ts']) & (attr['next_start_ts'].isna() | (attr['start_ts']<attr['next_start_ts']))
attr=attr.merge(q[['batch_id','rejected_pct','defect_code','inspection_result']], on='batch_id', how='left')
attr['is_rejected']=attr['inspection_result'].eq('REJECTED')
attr=attr.merge(prod[['product_id','quality_rejection_threshold_pct']], on='product_id', how='left')

for wo in ['WO_001027','WO_000186','WO_001602','WO_001953','WO_002656','WO_000830','WO_000745','WO_002301','WO_001115','WO_000803','WO_000814','WO_002793','WO_000289','WO_001639','WO_002617','WO_001708','WO_000369','WO_000864','WO_002790']:
    s=svc.loc[svc['work_order_id']==wo].iloc[0]
    df=attr[(attr['work_order_id']==wo)&(attr['link_ok'])].copy()
    print('\n===',wo,s['technician_id'],s['machine_id'],'day',s['day'],'prev',s['prev_work_order_id'],s['prev_technician_id'],'next',s['next_work_order_id'],s['next_technician_id'],'===')
    grp=df.groupby('product_id').agg(batches=('batch_id','size'), rejects=('is_rejected','sum'), avg_pct=('rejected_pct','mean'), defect_codes=('defect_code', lambda s: ','.join(sorted(s.unique())))).sort_values(['rejects','batches'], ascending=False)
    print(grp.to_string())
    if df['is_rejected'].any():
        print(df[df['is_rejected']][['production_day','start_time','batch_id','product_id','rejected_pct','defect_code']].to_string(index=False))

svc['completed_ts']=(svc['day']-1)*1440+svc['completed'].map(t2m)
svc=svc.sort_values(['machine_id','completed_ts','work_order_id']).reset_index(drop=True)

svc['prev_technician_id']=svc.groupby('machine_id')['technician_id'].shift(1)

steps.message: I’m checking the borderline technicians against machine history now. Some intervals have only `2 of 3` rejected batches, so I’m comparing the same machine-product before and after the maintenance to see whether the defect state clearly starts with that work order or if it’s just noise near the threshold.

import pandas as pd
from pathlib import Path
# load service
records=[]
for p in sorted(Path('/app/raw_service_reports').rglob('*_service.txt')):
    rec={}
    for line in p.read_text().splitlines():
        if ': ' in line:
            k,v=line.split(': ',1)
            rec[k.strip()] = v.strip()
    records.append(rec)
svc=pd.DataFrame(records).rename(columns={'DAY':'day','WORK ORDER':'work_order_id','MACHINE':'machine_id','TECHNICIAN':'technician_id','STARTED':'started','COMPLETED':'completed'})
svc['day']=svc['day'].astype(int)
def t2m(s):
    h,m=map(int,s.split(':'))
    return h*60+m
svc['start_ts']=(svc['day']-1)*1440+svc['started'].map(t2m)
svc['completed_ts']=(svc['day']-1)*1440+svc['completed'].map(t2m)
svc=svc.sort_values(['machine_id','completed_ts','work_order_id']).reset_index(drop=True)
svc['next_start_ts']=svc.groupby('machine_id')['start_ts'].shift(-1)
svc['prev_work_order_id']=svc.groupby('machine_id')['work_order_id'].shift(1)
svc['prev_technician_id']=svc.groupby('machine_id')['technician_id'].shift(1)
svc['next_work_order_id']=svc.groupby('machine_id')['work_order_id'].shift(-1)
svc['next_technician_id']=svc.groupby('machine_id')['technician_id'].shift(-1)

b=pd.read_csv('/app/production_batches.csv')
a=pd.read_csv('/app/machine_assignment_log.csv')
q=pd.read_csv('/app/quality_inspections.csv')

jobs=b.merge(a[['job_id','machine_id','start_time']], on=['job_id','machine_id'], how='left')
jobs['start_ts']=(jobs['production_day']-1)*1440+jobs['start_time'].map(t2m)
parts=[]
for m, dfm in jobs.groupby('machine_id', sort=False):
    svcm=svc[svc['machine_id']==m][['work_order_id','technician_id','completed_ts','next_start_ts','day']].sort_values('completed_ts')
    dfm=dfm.sort_values('start_ts').copy()
    if svcm.empty:
        for c in ['work_order_id','technician_id','completed_ts','next_start_ts','maint_day']:
            dfm[c]=pd.NA
    else:
        dfm=pd.merge_asof(dfm, svcm.rename(columns={'day':'maint_day'}), left_on='start_ts', right_on='completed_ts', direction='backward')
    parts.append(dfm)
attr=pd.concat(parts, ignore_index=True)
attr['link_ok']=attr['completed_ts'].notna() & (attr['start_ts']>attr['completed_ts']) & (attr['next_start_ts'].isna() | (attr['start_ts']<attr['next_start_ts']))
attr=attr[attr['link_ok']].merge(q[['batch_id','rejected_pct','defect_code','inspection_result']], on='batch_id', how='left')

# show machine-product history around selected cases
cases=[('M_042','P_010','WO_003013'),('M_004','P_006','WO_001805'),('M_007','P_010','WO_000745'),('M_015','P_024','WO_000803'),('M_015','P_024','WO_000830'),('M_029','P_024','WO_002301'),('M_009','P_019','WO_002802'),('M_028','P_004','WO_002656')]
for machine, product, wo in cases:
    print('\n===',machine,product,'focus',wo,'===')
    df=attr[(attr['machine_id']==machine)&(attr['product_id']==product)].copy()
    df=df[['production_day','start_time','batch_id','work_order_id','technician_id','rejected_pct','defect_code','inspection_result']].sort_values(['production_day','start_time'])
    print(df.to_string(index=False))

python - <<'PY'
import pandas as pd
from pathlib import Path
# parse services
records=[]
for p in sorted(Path('/app/raw_service_reports').rglob('*_service.txt')):
    rec={}
    for line in p.read_text().splitlines():
        if ': ' in line:
            k,v=line.split(': ',1)
            rec[k.strip()] = v.strip()
    records.append(rec)
svc=pd.DataFrame(records).rename(columns={'DAY':'day','WORK ORDER':'work_order_id','MACHINE':'machine_id','TECHNICIAN':'technician_id','STARTED':'started','COMPLETED':'completed'})
svc['day']=svc['day'].astype(int)
def t2m(s):
    h,m=map(int,s.split(':'))
    return h*60+m
svc['start_ts']=(svc['day']-1)*1440+svc['started'].map(t2m)
svc['completed_ts']=(svc['day']-1)*1440+svc['completed'].map(t2m)
svc=svc.sort_values(['machine_id','completed_ts','work_order_id']).reset_index(drop=True)
svc['next_start_ts']=svc.groupby('machine_id')['start_ts'].shift(-1)

b=pd.read_csv('/app/production_batches.csv')
a=pd.read_csv('/app/machine_assignment_log.csv')
q=pd.read_csv('/app/quality_inspections.csv')
prod=pd.read_csv('/app/products.csv')

jobs=b.merge(a[['job_id','machine_id','start_time']], on=['job_id','machine_id'], how='left')
jobs['start_ts']=(jobs['production_day']-1)*1440+jobs['start_time'].map(t2m)
parts=[]
for m, dfm in jobs.groupby('machine_id', sort=False):
    svcm=svc[svc['machine_id']==m][['work_order_id','technician_id','completed_ts','next_start_ts','day']].sort_values('completed_ts')
    dfm=dfm.sort_values('start_ts').copy()
    if svcm.empty:
        for c in ['work_order_id','technician_id','completed_ts','next_start_ts','maint_day']:
            dfm[c]=pd.NA
    else:
        dfm=pd.merge_asof(dfm, svcm.rename(columns={'day':'maint_day'}), left_on='start_ts', right_on='completed_ts', direction='backward')
    parts.append(dfm)
attr=pd.concat(parts, ignore_index=True)
attr['link_ok']=attr['completed_ts'].notna() & (attr['start_ts']>attr['completed_ts']) & (attr['next_start_ts'].isna() | (attr['start_ts']<attr['next_start_ts']))
attr=attr[attr['link_ok']].merge(q[['batch_id','rejected_pct','defect_code','inspection_result']], on='batch_id', how='left')
attr['is_rejected']=attr['inspection_result'].eq('REJECTED')
prod_stats=attr.groupby('product_id').agg(mean_pct=('rejected_pct','mean'), std_pct=('rejected_pct','std'), p_rej=('is_rejected','mean')).reset_index()
interval=attr.groupby(['work_order_id','technician_id','machine_id','maint_day','product_id']).agg(
    batches=('batch_id','size'),
    rejects=('is_rejected','sum'),
    avg_pct=('rejected_pct','mean'),
    min_pct=('rejected_pct','min'),
    max_pct=('rejected_pct','max')
).reset_index().merge(prod_stats,on='product_id',how='left')
interval['z']=(interval['avg_pct']-interval['mean_pct'])/interval['std_pct']
for zthr in [2.5,3.0,3.5,4.0,4.5]:
    cand=interval[(interval['rejects']>=1)&(interval['z']>=zthr)]
    tech=cand.groupby('technician_id').agg(batches=('rejects','sum'), work_orders=('work_order_id','nunique'), products=('product_id', lambda s: ','.join(sorted(s.unique()))), nrows=('work_order_id','size')).sort_values(['batches','work_orders'], ascending=False)
    print('\n=== z >=',zthr,'===')
    print(tech.head(20).to_string())

import pandas as pd
from pathlib import Path
# load attr
records=[]
for p in sorted(Path('/app/raw_service_reports').rglob('*_service.txt')):
    rec={}
    for line in p.read_text().splitlines():
        if ': ' in line:
            k,v=line.split(': ',1)
            rec[k.strip()] = v.strip()
    records.append(rec)
svc=pd.DataFrame(records).rename(columns={'DAY':'day','WORK ORDER':'work_order_id','MACHINE':'machine_id','TECHNICIAN':'technician_id','STARTED':'started','COMPLETED':'completed'})
svc['day']=svc['day'].astype(int)
def t2m(s):
    h,m=map(int,s.split(':'))
    return h*60+m
svc['start_ts']=(svc['day']-1)*1440+svc['started'].map(t2m)
svc['completed_ts']=(svc['day']-1)*1440+svc['completed'].map(t2m)
svc=svc.sort_values(['machine_id','completed_ts','work_order_id']).reset_index(drop=True)
svc['next_start_ts']=svc.groupby('machine_id')['start_ts'].shift(-1)

b=pd.read_csv('/app/production_batches.csv')
a=pd.read_csv('/app/machine_assignment_log.csv')
q=pd.read_csv('/app/quality_inspections.csv')

jobs=b.merge(a[['job_id','machine_id','start_time']], on=['job_id','machine_id'], how='left')
jobs['start_ts']=(jobs['production_day']-1)*1440+jobs['start_time'].map(t2m)
parts=[]
for m, dfm in jobs.groupby('machine_id', sort=False):
    svcm=svc[svc['machine_id']==m][['work_order_id','technician_id','completed_ts','next_start_ts','day']].sort_values('completed_ts')
    dfm=dfm.sort_values('start_ts').copy()
    if svcm.empty:
        for c in ['work_order_id','technician_id','completed_ts','next_start_ts','maint_day']:
            dfm[c]=pd.NA
    else:
        dfm=pd.merge_asof(dfm, svcm.rename(columns={'day':'maint_day'}), left_on='start_ts', right_on='completed_ts', direction='backward')
    parts.append(dfm)
attr=pd.concat(parts, ignore_index=True)
attr['link_ok']=attr['completed_ts'].notna() & (attr['start_ts']>attr['completed_ts']) & (attr['next_start_ts'].isna() | (attr['start_ts']<attr['next_start_ts']))
attr=attr[attr['link_ok']].merge(q[['batch_id','rejected_pct','defect_code','inspection_result']], on='batch_id', how='left')

for machine, product in [('M_021','P_002'),('M_021','P_010'),('M_021','P_020')]:
    print('\n===',machine,product,'===')
    df=attr[(attr['machine_id']==machine)&(attr['product_id']==product)][['production_day','start_time','batch_id','work_order_id','technician_id','rejected_pct','defect_code','inspection_result']].sort_values(['production_day','start_time'])
    print(df.to_string(index=False))

arguments.cmd:
python - <<'PY'
import pandas as pd
from pathlib import Path
# load data
records=[]
for p in sorted(Path('/app/raw_service_reports').rglob('*_service.txt')):
    rec={}
    for line in p.read_text().splitlines():
        if ': ' in line:
            k,v=line.split(': ',1)
            rec[k.strip()] = v.strip()
    records.append(rec)
svc=pd.DataFrame(records).rename(columns={'DAY':'day','WORK ORDER':'work_order_id','MACHINE':'machine_id','TECHNICIAN':'technician_id','WORK TYPE':'work_type','REPORTED REASON':'reported_reason','STARTED':'started','COMPLETED':'completed'})
svc['day']=svc['day'].astype(int)
def t2m(s):
    h,m=map(int,s.split(':'))
    return h*60+m
svc['start_ts']=(svc['day']-1)*1440+svc['started'].map(t2m)
svc['completed_ts']=(svc['day']-1)*1440+svc['completed'].map(t2m)
svc=svc.sort_values(['machine_id','completed_ts','work_order_id']).reset_index(drop=True)
svc['next_start_ts']=svc.groupby('machine_id')['start_ts'].shift(-1)

b=pd.read_csv('/app/production_batches.csv')
a=pd.read_csv('/app/machine_assignment_log.csv')
q=pd.read_csv('/app/quality_inspections.csv')
prod=pd.read_csv('/app/products.csv')

jobs=b.merge(a[['job_id','machine_id','start_time']], on=['job_id','machine_id'], how='left')
jobs['start_ts']=(jobs['production_day']-1)*1440+jobs['start_time'].map(t2m)
parts=[]
for m, dfm in jobs.groupby('machine_id', sort=False):
    svcm=svc[svc['machine_id']==m][['work_order_id','technician_id','completed_ts','next_start_ts','day','work_type','reported_reason']].sort_values('completed_ts')
    dfm=dfm.sort_values('start_ts').copy()
    if svcm.empty:
        for c in ['work_order_id','technician_id','completed_ts','next_start_ts','maint_day','work_type','reported_reason']:
            dfm[c]=pd.NA
    else:
        dfm=pd.merge_asof(dfm, svcm.rename(columns={'day':'maint_day'}), left_on='start_ts', right_on='completed_ts', direction='backward')
    parts.append(dfm)
attr=pd.concat(parts, ignore_index=True)
attr['link_ok']=attr['completed_ts'].notna() & (attr['start_ts']>attr['completed_ts']) & (attr['next_start_ts'].isna() | (attr['start_ts']<attr['next_start_ts']))
attr=attr[attr['link_ok']].merge(q[['batch_id','inspection_day','rejected_pct','defect_code','inspection_result']], on='batch_id', how='left')
attr['is_rejected']=attr['inspection_result'].eq('REJECTED')
prod_stats=attr.groupby('product_id').agg(mean_pct=('rejected_pct','mean'), std_pct=('rejected_pct','std'), p_rej=('is_rejected','mean')).reset_index()
attr=attr.merge(prod_stats,on='product_id',how='left')
attr['z_batch']=(attr['rejected_pct']-attr['mean_pct'])/attr['std_pct']
interval=attr.groupby(['work_order_id','technician_id','machine_id','maint_day','product_id']).agg(
    batches=('batch_id','size'), rejects=('is_rejected','sum'), avg_pct=('rejected_pct','mean'), min_pct=('rejected_pct','min'), max_pct=('rejected_pct','max'),
    z_mean=('z_batch','mean'), z_max=('z_batch','max'),
    defects=('defect_code', lambda s: ','.join(sorted(s.unique()))),
    reject_defects=('defect_code', lambda s: ','.join(sorted(s[attr.loc[s.index,'is_rejected']].unique())) if (attr.loc[s.index,'is_rejected']).any() else ''),
).reset_index().merge(prod_stats,on='product_id',how='left')
interval['z_avg']=(interval['avg_pct']-interval['mean_pct'])/interval['std_pct']

cands=['TECH_002','TECH_003','TECH_014','TECH_021','TECH_027','TECH_030','TECH_031','TECH_037','TECH_041','TECH_032']
for tech in cands:
    print('\n###',tech,'###')
    df=interval[(interval['technician_id']==tech)&(interval['rejects']>0)].sort_values(['z_avg','rejects','batches'], ascending=[False,False,False])
    print(df[['work_order_id','machine_id','maint_day','product_id','batches','rejects','avg_pct','z_avg','min_pct','max_pct','reject_defects','defects']].to_string(index=False))

import pandas as pd
from pathlib import Path
# load attr
records=[]
for p in sorted(Path('/app/raw_service_reports').rglob('*_service.txt')):
    rec={}
    for line in p.read_text().splitlines():
        if ': ' in line:
            k,v=line.split(': ',1)
            rec[k.strip()] = v.strip()
    records.append(rec)
svc=pd.DataFrame(records).rename(columns={'DAY':'day','WORK ORDER':'work_order_id','MACHINE':'machine_id','TECHNICIAN':'technician_id','STARTED':'started','COMPLETED':'completed'})
svc['day']=svc['day'].astype(int)
def t2m(s):
    h,m=map(int,s.split(':'))
    return h*60+m
svc['start_ts']=(svc['day']-1)*1440+svc['started'].map(t2m)
svc['completed_ts']=(svc['day']-1)*1440+svc['completed'].map(t2m)
svc=svc.sort_values(['machine_id','completed_ts','work_order_id']).reset_index(drop=True)
svc['next_start_ts']=svc.groupby('machine_id')['start_ts'].shift(-1)

b=pd.read_csv('/app/production_batches.csv')
a=pd.read_csv('/app/machine_assignment_log.csv')
q=pd.read_csv('/app/quality_inspections.csv')

jobs=b.merge(a[['job_id','machine_id','start_time']], on=['job_id','machine_id'], how='left')
jobs['start_ts']=(jobs['production_day']-1)*1440+jobs['start_time'].map(t2m)
parts=[]
for m, dfm in jobs.groupby('machine_id', sort=False):
    svcm=svc[svc['machine_id']==m][['work_order_id','technician_id','completed_ts','next_start_ts','day']].sort_values('completed_ts')
    dfm=dfm.sort_values('start_ts').copy()
    if svcm.empty:
        for c in ['work_order_id','technician_id','completed_ts','next_start_ts','maint_day']:
            dfm[c]=pd.NA
    else:
        dfm=pd.merge_asof(dfm, svcm.rename(columns={'day':'maint_day'}), left_on='start_ts', right_on='completed_ts', direction='backward')
    parts.append(dfm)
attr=pd.concat(parts, ignore_index=True)
attr['link_ok']=attr['completed_ts'].notna() & (attr['start_ts']>attr['completed_ts']) & (attr['next_start_ts'].isna() | (attr['start_ts']<attr['next_start_ts']))
attr=attr[attr['link_ok']].merge(q[['batch_id','rejected_pct','defect_code','inspection_result']], on='batch_id', how='left')

cases=[('M_004','P_006','WO_001805'),('M_042','P_010','WO_003013'),('M_021','P_002','WO_002624'),('M_021','P_010','WO_002624')]
for machine, product, focus in cases:
    df=attr[(attr['machine_id']==machine)&(attr['product_id']==product)].sort_values('start_ts').reset_index(drop=True)
    idx=df.index[df['work_order_id']==focus].tolist()
    if not idx:
        print('no rows for',machine,product,focus)
        continue
    first=max(min(idx)-5,0)
    last=min(max(idx)+6,len(df))
    print('\n===',machine,product,'focus',focus,'===')
    print(df.loc[first:last,['production_day','start_time','batch_id','work_order_id','technician_id','rejected_pct','defect_code','inspection_result']].to_string(index=False))

import pandas as pd
from pathlib import Path
# load data as before
records=[]
for p in sorted(Path('/app/raw_service_reports').rglob('*_service.txt')):
    rec={}
    for line in p.read_text().splitlines():
        if ': ' in line:
            k,v=line.split(': ',1)
            rec[k.strip()] = v.strip()
    records.append(rec)
svc=pd.DataFrame(records).rename(columns={'DAY':'day','WORK ORDER':'work_order_id','MACHINE':'machine_id','TECHNICIAN':'technician_id','STARTED':'started','COMPLETED':'completed'})
svc['day']=svc['day'].astype(int)
def t2m(s):
    h,m=map(int,s.split(':'))
    return h*60+m
svc['start_ts']=(svc['day']-1)*1440+svc['started'].map(t2m)
svc['completed_ts']=(svc['day']-1)*1440+svc['completed'].map(t2m)
svc=svc.sort_values(['machine_id','completed_ts','work_order_id']).reset_index(drop=True)
svc['next_start_ts']=svc.groupby('machine_id')['start_ts'].shift(-1)

b=pd.read_csv('/app/production_batches.csv')
a=pd.read_csv('/app/machine_assignment_log.csv')
q=pd.read_csv('/app/quality_inspections.csv')
prod=pd.read_csv('/app/products.csv')

jobs=b.merge(a[['job_id','machine_id','start_time']], on=['job_id','machine_id'], how='left')
jobs['start_ts']=(jobs['production_day']-1)*1440+jobs['start_time'].map(t2m)
parts=[]
for m, dfm in jobs.groupby('machine_id', sort=False):
    svcm=svc[svc['machine_id']==m][['work_order_id','technician_id','completed_ts','next_start_ts','day']].sort_values('completed_ts')
    dfm=dfm.sort_values('start_ts').copy()
    if svcm.empty:
        for c in ['work_order_id','technician_id','completed_ts','next_start_ts','maint_day']:
            dfm[c]=pd.NA
    else:
        dfm=pd.merge_asof(dfm, svcm.rename(columns={'day':'maint_day'}), left_on='start_ts', right_on='completed_ts', direction='backward')
    parts.append(dfm)
attr=pd.concat(parts, ignore_index=True)
attr['link_ok']=attr['completed_ts'].notna() & (attr['start_ts']>attr['completed_ts']) & (attr['next_start_ts'].isna() | (attr['start_ts']<attr['next_start_ts']))
attr=attr[attr['link_ok']].merge(q[['batch_id','rejected_pct','defect_code','inspection_result']], on='batch_id', how='left')
attr['is_rejected']=attr['inspection_result'].eq('REJECTED')
prod_stats=attr.groupby('product_id').agg(mean_pct=('rejected_pct','mean'), std_pct=('rejected_pct','std')).reset_index()
attr=attr.merge(prod_stats,on='product_id',how='left')
attr['z_batch']=(attr['rejected_pct']-attr['mean_pct'])/attr['std_pct']
techs=['TECH_002','TECH_003','TECH_004','TECH_014','TECH_021','TECH_027','TECH_030','TECH_031','TECH_032','TECH_037','TECH_041']
rej=attr[attr['is_rejected'] & attr['technician_id'].isin(techs)]
summary=rej.groupby(['technician_id','product_id']).agg(
    rejects=('batch_id','size'),
    work_orders=('work_order_id','nunique'),
    max_z=('z_batch','max'),
    avg_z=('z_batch','mean'),
    avg_pct=('rejected_pct','mean'),
    min_pct=('rejected_pct','min'),
    max_pct=('rejected_pct','max'),
    work_order_list=('work_order_id', lambda s: ','.join(sorted(s.unique()))),
    machine_list=('machine_id', lambda s: ','.join(sorted(s.unique()))),
    defect_list=('defect_code', lambda s: ','.join(sorted(s.unique())))
).reset_index().sort_values(['technician_id','rejects','work_orders'], ascending=[True,False,False])
print(summary.to_string(index=False))

steps.message: I’ve got the strong fault episodes, but low-threshold products like `P_020` create a lot of ordinary borderline rejects. I’m now checking product-by-technician enrichment against each product’s normal reject rate so I only keep products that are truly overrepresented after a given technician’s maintenance.

python - <<'PY'
import pandas as pd
from pathlib import Path
from math import comb
from scipy.stats import binomtest
# load attr
records=[]
for p in sorted(Path('/app/raw_service_reports').rglob('*_service.txt')):
    rec={}
    for line in p.read_text().splitlines():
        if ': ' in line:
            k,v=line.split(': ',1)
            rec[k.strip()] = v.strip()
    records.append(rec)
svc=pd.DataFrame(records).rename(columns={'DAY':'day','WORK ORDER':'work_order_id','MACHINE':'machine_id','TECHNICIAN':'technician_id','STARTED':'started','COMPLETED':'completed'})
svc['day']=svc['day'].astype(int)
def t2m(s):
    h,m=map(int,s.split(':'))
    return h*60+m
svc['start_ts']=(svc['day']-1)*1440+svc['started'].map(t2m)
svc['completed_ts']=(svc['day']-1)*1440+svc['completed'].map(t2m)
svc=svc.sort_values(['machine_id','completed_ts','work_order_id']).reset_index(drop=True)
svc['next_start_ts']=svc.groupby('machine_id')['start_ts'].shift(-1)

b=pd.read_csv('/app/production_batches.csv')
a=pd.read_csv('/app/machine_assignment_log.csv')
q=pd.read_csv('/app/quality_inspections.csv')

jobs=b.merge(a[['job_id','machine_id','start_time']], on=['job_id','machine_id'], how='left')
jobs['start_ts']=(jobs['production_day']-1)*1440+jobs['start_time'].map(t2m)
parts=[]
for m, dfm in jobs.groupby('machine_id', sort=False):
    svcm=svc[svc['machine_id']==m][['work_order_id','technician_id','completed_ts','next_start_ts','day']].sort_values('completed_ts')
    dfm=dfm.sort_values('start_ts').copy()
    if svcm.empty:
        for c in ['work_order_id','technician_id','completed_ts','next_start_ts','maint_day']:
            dfm[c]=pd.NA
    else:
        dfm=pd.merge_asof(dfm, svcm.rename(columns={'day':'maint_day'}), left_on='start_ts', right_on='completed_ts', direction='backward')
    parts.append(dfm)
attr=pd.concat(parts, ignore_index=True)
attr['link_ok']=attr['completed_ts'].notna() & (attr['start_ts']>attr['completed_ts']) & (attr['next_start_ts'].isna() | (attr['start_ts']<attr['next_start_ts']))
attr=attr[attr['link_ok']].merge(q[['batch_id','rejected_pct','defect_code','inspection_result']], on='batch_id', how='left')
attr['is_rejected']=attr['inspection_result'].eq('REJECTED')
base=attr.groupby('product_id').agg(total_batches=('batch_id','size'), total_rejects=('is_rejected','sum')).reset_index()
base['base_rate']=base['total_rejects']/base['total_batches']
techprod=attr.groupby(['technician_id','product_id']).agg(batches=('batch_id','size'), rejects=('is_rejected','sum')).reset_index().merge(base,on='product_id',how='left')
techprod['rate']=techprod['rejects']/techprod['batches']
techprod['lift']=techprod['rate']/techprod['base_rate']
techprod['pval']=techprod.apply(lambda r: binomtest(int(r.rejects), int(r.batches), float(r.base_rate), alternative='greater').pvalue if r.rejects>0 else 1.0, axis=1)
# show pairs with >=1 reject and either p<1e-4 or rejects>=2 & p<0.01
cand=techprod[(techprod['rejects']>=1)&((techprod['pval']<1e-4)|((techprod['rejects']>=2)&(techprod['pval']<0.01))|((techprod['rejects']>=3)&(techprod['pval']<0.05)))].sort_values(['pval','rejects'])
print(cand.to_string(index=False))

python - <<'PY'
import pandas as pd
from pathlib import Path
# load attr
records=[]
for p in sorted(Path('/app/raw_service_reports').rglob('*_service.txt')):
    rec={}
    for line in p.read_text().splitlines():
        if ': ' in line:
            k,v=line.split(': ',1)
            rec[k.strip()] = v.strip()
    records.append(rec)
svc=pd.DataFrame(records).rename(columns={'DAY':'day','WORK ORDER':'work_order_id','MACHINE':'machine_id','TECHNICIAN':'technician_id','STARTED':'started','COMPLETED':'completed'})
svc['day']=svc['day'].astype(int)
def t2m(s):
    h,m=map(int,s.split(':'))
    return h*60+m
svc['start_ts']=(svc['day']-1)*1440+svc['started'].map(t2m)
svc['completed_ts']=(svc['day']-1)*1440+svc['completed'].map(t2m)
svc=svc.sort_values(['machine_id','completed_ts','work_order_id']).reset_index(drop=True)
svc['next_start_ts']=svc.groupby('machine_id')['start_ts'].shift(-1)
svc['prev_work_order_id']=svc.groupby('machine_id')['work_order_id'].shift(1)
svc['prev_technician_id']=svc.groupby('machine_id')['technician_id'].shift(1)
svc['next_work_order_id']=svc.groupby('machine_id')['work_order_id'].shift(-1)
svc['next_technician_id']=svc.groupby('machine_id')['technician_id'].shift(-1)

b=pd.read_csv('/app/production_batches.csv')
a=pd.read_csv('/app/machine_assignment_log.csv')
q=pd.read_csv('/app/quality_inspections.csv')

jobs=b.merge(a[['job_id','machine_id','start_time']], on=['job_id','machine_id'], how='left')
jobs['start_ts']=(jobs['production_day']-1)*1440+jobs['start_time'].map(t2m)
parts=[]
for m, dfm in jobs.groupby('machine_id', sort=False):
    svcm=svc[svc['machine_id']==m][['work_order_id','technician_id','completed_ts','next_start_ts','day']].sort_values('completed_ts')
    dfm=dfm.sort_values('start_ts').copy()
    if svcm.empty:
        for c in ['work_order_id','technician_id','completed_ts','next_start_ts','maint_day']:
            dfm[c]=pd.NA
    else:
        dfm=pd.merge_asof(dfm, svcm.rename(columns={'day':'maint_day'}), left_on='start_ts', right_on='completed_ts', direction='backward')
    parts.append(dfm)
attr=pd.concat(parts, ignore_index=True)
attr['link_ok']=attr['completed_ts'].notna() & (attr['start_ts']>attr['completed_ts']) & (attr['next_start_ts'].isna() | (attr['start_ts']<attr['next_start_ts']))
attr=attr[attr['link_ok']].merge(q[['batch_id','rejected_pct','defect_code','inspection_result']], on='batch_id', how='left')

cases=[('M_006','P_017','WO_000114'),('M_055','P_017','WO_000618'),('M_015','P_017','WO_000735')]
for machine, product, focus in cases:
    df=attr[(attr['machine_id']==machine)&(attr['product_id']==product)].sort_values('start_ts').reset_index(drop=True)
    idx=df.index[df['work_order_id']==focus].tolist()
    print('\n===',machine,product,'focus',focus,'===')
    if not idx:
        print('focus not found')
        print(df.tail(10).to_string(index=False))
        continue
    first=max(min(idx)-4,0); last=min(max(idx)+5,len(df))
    print(df.loc[first:last,['production_day','start_time','batch_id','work_order_id','technician_id','rejected_pct','defect_code','inspection_result']].to_string(index=False))

python - <<'PY'
import pandas as pd
from pathlib import Path

# load service reports
records=[]
for p in sorted(Path('/app/raw_service_reports').rglob('*_service.txt')):
    rec={}
    for line in p.read_text().splitlines():
        if ': ' in line:
            k,v=line.split(': ',1)
            rec[k.strip()] = v.strip()
    records.append(rec)
svc=pd.DataFrame(records).rename(columns={'DAY':'day','WORK ORDER':'work_order_id','MACHINE':'machine_id','TECHNICIAN':'technician_id','STARTED':'started','COMPLETED':'completed'})
svc['day']=svc['day'].astype(int)
def t2m(s):
    h,m=map(int,s.split(':'))
    return h*60+m
svc['start_ts']=(svc['day']-1)*1440+svc['started'].map(t2m)
svc['completed_ts']=(svc['day']-1)*1440+svc['completed'].map(t2m)
svc=svc.sort_values(['machine_id','completed_ts','work_order_id']).reset_index(drop=True)
svc['next_start_ts']=svc.groupby('machine_id')['start_ts'].shift(-1)

b=pd.read_csv('/app/production_batches.csv')
a=pd.read_csv('/app/machine_assignment_log.csv')
q=pd.read_csv('/app/quality_inspections.csv')
prod=pd.read_csv('/app/products.csv')
prod=prod.set_index('product_id')['quality_rejection_threshold_pct'].to_dict()

jobs=b.merge(a[['job_id','machine_id','start_time']], on=['job_id','machine_id'], how='left')
jobs['start_ts']=(jobs['production_day']-1)*1440+jobs['start_time'].map(t2m)
parts=[]
for m, dfm in jobs.groupby('machine_id', sort=False):
    svcm=svc[svc['machine_id']==m][['work_order_id','technician_id','completed_ts','next_start_ts','day']].sort_values('completed_ts')
    dfm=dfm.sort_values('start_ts').copy()
    if svcm.empty:
        for c in ['work_order_id','technician_id','completed_ts','next_start_ts','maint_day']:
            dfm[c]=pd.NA
    else:
        dfm=pd.merge_asof(dfm, svcm.rename(columns={'day':'maint_day'}), left_on='start_ts', right_on='completed_ts', direction='backward')
    parts.append(dfm)
attr=pd.concat(parts, ignore_index=True)
attr['link_ok']=attr['completed_ts'].notna() & (attr['start_ts']>attr['completed_ts']) & (attr['next_start_ts'].isna() | (attr['start_ts']<attr['next_start_ts']))
attr=attr[attr['link_ok']].merge(q[['batch_id','rejected_pct','defect_code','inspection_result']], on='batch_id', how='left')
attr['is_rejected']=attr['inspection_result'].eq('REJECTED')
# previous/next same machine/product batch
attr=attr.sort_values(['machine_id','product_id','start_ts']).reset_index(drop=True)
attr['prev_pct']=attr.groupby(['machine_id','product_id'])['rejected_pct'].shift(1)
attr['prev_result']=attr.groupby(['machine_id','product_id'])['inspection_result'].shift(1)
attr['prev_wo']=attr.groupby(['machine_id','product_id'])['work_order_id'].shift(1)
attr['next_pct']=attr.groupby(['machine_id','product_id'])['rejected_pct'].shift(-1)
attr['next_result']=attr.groupby(['machine_id','product_id'])['inspection_result'].shift(-1)
attr['next_wo']=attr.groupby(['machine_id','product_id'])['work_order_id'].shift(-1)

# per interval product stats
interval=attr.groupby(['work_order_id','technician_id','machine_id','maint_day','product_id']).agg(
    batches=('batch_id','size'), rejects=('is_rejected','sum'), avg_pct=('rejected_pct','mean'), max_pct=('rejected_pct','max'), min_pct=('rejected_pct','min')
).reset_index()
interval['thr']=interval['product_id'].map(prod)
interval['multi_signal']=((interval['rejects']>=2) & ((interval['batches']<=3) | (interval['avg_pct']>=interval['thr']-0.005))) | ((interval['rejects']>=3))
# map back
interval_key=interval.set_index(['work_order_id','product_id'])['multi_signal'].to_dict()
attr['multi_signal']=attr.set_index(['work_order_id','product_id']).index.map(interval_key)
# local spike signal for rejected batch
attr['thr']=attr['product_id'].map(prod)
attr['local_signal']=attr['is_rejected'] & (
    (
        attr['prev_pct'].notna() & attr['next_pct'].notna() &
        attr['prev_result'].eq('ACCEPTED') & attr['next_result'].eq('ACCEPTED') &
        (attr['rejected_pct'] >= attr['prev_pct'] + 0.01) &
        (attr['rejected_pct'] >= attr['next_pct'] + 0.01)
    ) |
    (
        attr['prev_pct'].isna() & attr['next_pct'].notna() & attr['next_result'].eq('ACCEPTED') & (attr['rejected_pct'] >= attr['next_pct'] + 0.015)
    ) |
    (
        attr['next_pct'].isna() & attr['prev_pct'].notna() & attr['prev_result'].eq('ACCEPTED') & (attr['rejected_pct'] >= attr['prev_pct'] + 0.015)
    )
)
attr['causal_signal']=attr['is_rejected'] & (attr['multi_signal'] | attr['local_signal'])
# summarize technicians
tech=attr[attr['causal_signal']].groupby('technician_id').agg(batches=('batch_id','size'), work_orders=('work_order_id','nunique'), products=('product_id', lambda s: ','.join(sorted(s.unique())))).sort_values(['batches','work_orders'], ascending=False)
print('Technicians from heuristic')
print(tech.to_string())
print('\nProduct-tech counts')
pt=attr[attr['causal_signal']].groupby(['technician_id','product_id']).agg(rejects=('batch_id','size'), work_orders=('work_order_id','nunique')).sort_values(['technician_id','rejects'], ascending=[True,False])
print(pt.to_string())

attr=attr[attr['link_ok']].merge(q[['batch_id','rejected_pct','defect_code','inspection_result']], on='batch_id', how='left')
attr['is_rejected']=attr['inspection_result'].eq('REJECTED')
# previous/next same machine/product batch
attr=attr.sort_values(['machine_id','product_id','start_ts']).reset_index(drop=True)
attr['prev_pct']=attr.groupby(['machine_id','product_id'])['rejected_pct'].shift(1)
attr['prev_result']=attr.groupby(['machine_id','product_id'])['inspection_result'].shift(1)
attr['prev_wo']=attr.groupby(['machine_id','product_id'])['work_order_id'].shift(1)
attr['next_pct']=attr.groupby(['machine_id','product_id'])['rejected_pct'].shift(-1)
attr['next_result']=attr.groupby(['machine_id','product_id'])['inspection_result'].shift(-1)
attr['next_wo']=attr.groupby(['machine_id','product_id'])['work_order_id'].shift(-1)

# per interval product stats
interval=attr.groupby(['work_order_id','technician_id','machine_id','maint_day','product_id']).agg(
    batches=('batch_id','size'), rejects=('is_rejected','sum'), avg_pct=('rejected_pct','mean'), max_pct=('rejected_pct','max'), min_pct=('rejected_pct','min')
).reset_index()
interval['thr']=interval['product_id'].map(prod)
interval['multi_signal']=((interval['rejects']>=2) & ((interval['batches']<=3) | (interval['avg_pct']>=interval['thr']-0.005))) | ((interval['rejects']>=3))
# map back
interval_key=interval.set_index(['work_order_id','product_id'])['multi_signal'].to_dict()
attr['multi_signal']=attr.set_index(['work_order_id','product_id']).index.map(interval_key)
# local spike signal for rejected batch
attr['thr']=attr['product_id'].map(prod)
attr['local_signal']=attr['is_rejected'] & (
    (
        attr['prev_pct'].notna() & attr['next_pct'].notna() &
        attr['prev_result'].eq('ACCEPTED') & attr['next_result'].eq('ACCEPTED') &
        (attr['rejected_pct'] >= attr['prev_pct'] + 0.01) &
        (attr['rejected_pct'] >= attr['next_pct'] + 0.01)
    ) |
    (
        attr['prev_pct'].isna() & attr['next_pct'].notna() & attr['next_result'].eq('ACCEPTED') & (attr['rejected_pct'] >= attr['next_pct'] + 0.015)
    ) |
    (
        attr['next_pct'].isna() & attr['prev_pct'].notna() & attr['prev_result'].eq('ACCEPTED') & (attr['rejected_pct'] >= attr['prev_pct'] + 0.015)
    )
)
attr['causal_signal']=attr['is_rejected'] & (attr['multi_signal'] | attr['local_signal'])
# summarize technicians
tech=attr[attr['causal_signal']].groupby('technician_id').agg(batches=('batch_id','size'), work_orders=('work_order_id','nunique'), products=('product_id', lambda s: ','.join(sorted(s.unique())))).sort_values(['batches','work_orders'], ascending=False)
print('Technicians from heuristic')
print(tech.to_string())
print('\nProduct-tech counts')
pt=attr[attr['causal_signal']].groupby(['technician_id','product_id']).agg(rejects=('batch_id','size'), work_orders=('work_order_id','nunique')).sort_values(['technician_id','rejects'], ascending=[True,False])
print(pt.to_string())

import pandas as pd
from pathlib import Path
# load attr quickly
records=[]
for p in sorted(Path('/app/raw_service_reports').rglob('*_service.txt')):
    rec={}
    for line in p.read_text().splitlines():
        if ': ' in line:
            k,v=line.split(': ',1)
            rec[k.strip()] = v.strip()
    records.append(rec)
svc=pd.DataFrame(records).rename(columns={'DAY':'day','WORK ORDER':'work_order_id','MACHINE':'machine_id','TECHNICIAN':'technician_id','STARTED':'started','COMPLETED':'completed'})
svc['day']=svc['day'].astype(int)
def t2m(s):
    h,m=map(int,s.split(':'))
    return h*60+m
svc['start_ts']=(svc['day']-1)*1440+svc['started'].map(t2m)
svc['completed_ts']=(svc['day']-1)*1440+svc['completed'].map(t2m)
svc=svc.sort_values(['machine_id','completed_ts','work_order_id']).reset_index(drop=True)
svc['next_start_ts']=svc.groupby('machine_id')['start_ts'].shift(-1)

b=pd.read_csv('/app/production_batches.csv')
a=pd.read_csv('/app/machine_assignment_log.csv')
q=pd.read_csv('/app/quality_inspections.csv')

jobs=b.merge(a[['job_id','machine_id','start_time']], on=['job_id','machine_id'], how='left')
jobs['start_ts']=(jobs['production_day']-1)*1440+jobs['start_time'].map(t2m)
parts=[]
for m, dfm in jobs.groupby('machine_id', sort=False):
    svcm=svc[svc['machine_id']==m][['work_order_id','technician_id','completed_ts','next_start_ts','day']].sort_values('completed_ts')
    dfm=dfm.sort_values('start_ts').copy()
    if svcm.empty:
        for c in ['work_order_id','technician_id','completed_ts','next_start_ts','maint_day']:
            dfm[c]=pd.NA
    else:
        dfm=pd.merge_asof(dfm, svcm.rename(columns={'day':'maint_day'}), left_on='start_ts', right_on='completed_ts', direction='backward')
    parts.append(dfm)
attr=pd.concat(parts, ignore_index=True)
attr['link_ok']=attr['completed_ts'].notna() & (attr['start_ts']>attr['completed_ts']) & (attr['next_start_ts'].isna() | (attr['start_ts']<attr['next_start_ts']))
attr=attr[attr['link_ok']].merge(q[['batch_id','rejected_pct','defect_code','inspection_result']], on='batch_id', how='left')
rej=attr[attr['inspection_result']=='REJECTED']
for tech, product in [('TECH_014','P_020'),('TECH_031','P_020'),('TECH_041','P_020'),('TECH_032','P_020'),('TECH_004','P_002'),('TECH_041','P_010'),('TECH_032','P_010'),('TECH_024','P_017'),('TECH_034','P_021'),('TECH_037','P_021')]:
    df=rej[(rej['technician_id']==tech)&(rej['product_id']==product)]
    print(tech,product,len(df),df['defect_code'].tolist())

arguments.cmd:
python - <<'PY'
import pandas as pd
from pathlib import Path
from scipy.stats import binomtest
# load attr
records=[]
for p in sorted(Path('/app/raw_service_reports').rglob('*_service.txt')):
    rec={}
    for line in p.read_text().splitlines():
        if ': ' in line:
            k,v=line.split(': ',1)
            rec[k.strip()] = v.strip()
    records.append(rec)
svc=pd.DataFrame(records).rename(columns={'DAY':'day','WORK ORDER':'work_order_id','MACHINE':'machine_id','TECHNICIAN':'technician_id','STARTED':'started','COMPLETED':'completed'})
svc['day']=svc['day'].astype(int)
def t2m(s):
    h,m=map(int,s.split(':'))
    return h*60+m
svc['start_ts']=(svc['day']-1)*1440+svc['started'].map(t2m)
svc['completed_ts']=(svc['day']-1)*1440+svc['completed'].map(t2m)
svc=svc.sort_values(['machine_id','completed_ts','work_order_id']).reset_index(drop=True)
svc['next_start_ts']=svc.groupby('machine_id')['start_ts'].shift(-1)

b=pd.read_csv('/app/production_batches.csv')
a=pd.read_csv('/app/machine_assignment_log.csv')
q=pd.read_csv('/app/quality_inspections.csv')
prod=pd.read_csv('/app/products.csv').set_index('product_id')['quality_rejection_threshold_pct'].to_dict()

jobs=b.merge(a[['job_id','machine_id','start_time']], on=['job_id','machine_id'], how='left')
jobs['start_ts']=(jobs['production_day']-1)*1440+jobs['start_time'].map(t2m)
parts=[]
for m, dfm in jobs.groupby('machine_id', sort=False):
    svcm=svc[svc['machine_id']==m][['work_order_id','technician_id','completed_ts','next_start_ts','day']].sort_values('completed_ts')
    dfm=dfm.sort_values('start_ts').copy()
    if svcm.empty:
        for c in ['work_order_id','technician_id','completed_ts','next_start_ts','maint_day']:
            dfm[c]=pd.NA
    else:
        dfm=pd.merge_asof(dfm, svcm.rename(columns={'day':'maint_day'}), left_on='start_ts', right_on='completed_ts', direction='backward')
    parts.append(dfm)
attr=pd.concat(parts, ignore_index=True)
attr['link_ok']=attr['completed_ts'].notna() & (attr['start_ts']>attr['completed_ts']) & (attr['next_start_ts'].isna() | (attr['start_ts']<attr['next_start_ts']))
attr=attr[attr['link_ok']].merge(q[['batch_id','rejected_pct','inspection_result']], on='batch_id', how='left')
attr['is_rejected']=attr['inspection_result'].eq('REJECTED')
attr['thr']=attr['product_id'].map(prod)
attr['over_thr']=attr['rejected_pct']-attr['thr']
base=attr.groupby('product_id')['is_rejected'].mean()
techprod=attr.groupby(['technician_id','product_id']).agg(batches=('batch_id','size'), rejects=('is_rejected','sum'), work_orders=('work_order_id','nunique')).reset_index()
techprod['pval']=techprod.apply(lambda r: binomtest(int(r.rejects), int(r.batches), float(base[r.product_id]), alternative='greater').pvalue if r.rejects>0 else 1.0, axis=1)
interval=attr.groupby(['technician_id','work_order_id','product_id']).agg(rejects=('is_rejected','sum'), batches=('batch_id','size'), max_over=('over_thr','max')).reset_index()
# criterion
cand_pairs=[]
for _,r in techprod.iterrows():
    tech,prodid=r['technician_id'],r['product_id']
    sub=interval[(interval['technician_id']==tech)&(interval['product_id']==prodid)]
    cond1=(r['rejects']>=2 and r['work_orders']>=2 and r['pval']<0.05)
    cond2=((sub['rejects']>=2).any())
    cond3=(((sub['rejects']>=1) & (sub['max_over']>0.02)).any())
    if cond1 or cond2 or cond3:
        cand_pairs.append((tech,prodid,int(r['rejects']),int(r['work_orders']),r['pval'],cond1,cond2,cond3))
cp=pd.DataFrame(cand_pairs, columns=['tech','product','rejects','work_orders','pval','cond1','cond2','cond3'])
# confirmed techs based on these pairs
conf=cp.groupby('tech').agg(total_rejects=('rejects','sum'), total_wos=('work_orders','sum')).reset_index()
conf=conf[(conf['total_rejects']>=3)&(conf['total_wos']>=2)]
print('confirmed techs', conf.sort_values('tech').to_string(index=False))
print('\npairs for confirmed techs')
print(cp[cp['tech'].isin(conf['tech'])].sort_values(['tech','product']).to_string(index=False))
PY

# quick recompute with distinct work orders for selected pairs
import pandas as pd
from pathlib import Path
from scipy.stats import binomtest
records=[]
for p in sorted(Path('/app/raw_service_reports').rglob('*_service.txt')):
    rec={}
    for line in p.read_text().splitlines():
        if ': ' in line:
            k,v=line.split(': ',1)
            rec[k.strip()] = v.strip()
    records.append(rec)
svc=pd.DataFrame(records).rename(columns={'DAY':'day','WORK ORDER':'work_order_id','MACHINE':'machine_id','TECHNICIAN':'technician_id','STARTED':'started','COMPLETED':'completed'})
svc['day']=svc['day'].astype(int)
def t2m(s):
    h,m=map(int,s.split(':'))
    return h*60+m
svc['start_ts']=(svc['day']-1)*1440+svc['started'].map(t2m)
svc['completed_ts']=(svc['day']-1)*1440+svc['completed'].map(t2m)
svc=svc.sort_values(['machine_id','completed_ts','work_order_id']).reset_index(drop=True)
svc['next_start_ts']=svc.groupby('machine_id')['start_ts'].shift(-1)

b=pd.read_csv('/app/production_batches.csv')
a=pd.read_csv('/app/machine_assignment_log.csv')
q=pd.read_csv('/app/quality_inspections.csv')
prod=pd.read_csv('/app/products.csv').set_index('product_id')['quality_rejection_threshold_pct'].to_dict()

jobs=b.merge(a[['job_id','machine_id','start_time']], on=['job_id','machine_id'], how='left')
jobs['start_ts']=(jobs['production_day']-1)*1440+jobs['start_time'].map(t2m)
parts=[]
for m, dfm in jobs.groupby('machine_id', sort=False):
    svcm=svc[svc['machine_id']==m][['work_order_id','technician_id','completed_ts','next_start_ts','day']].sort_values('completed_ts')
    dfm=dfm.sort_values('start_ts').copy()
    if svcm.empty:
        for c in ['work_order_id','technician_id','completed_ts','next_start_ts','maint_day']:
            dfm[c]=pd.NA
    else:
        dfm=pd.merge_asof(dfm, svcm.rename(columns={'day':'maint_day'}), left_on='start_ts', right_on='completed_ts', direction='backward')
    parts.append(dfm)
attr=pd.concat(parts, ignore_index=True)
attr['link_ok']=attr['completed_ts'].notna() & (attr['start_ts']>attr['completed_ts']) & (attr['next_start_ts'].isna() | (attr['start_ts']<attr['next_start_ts']))
attr=attr[attr['link_ok']].merge(q[['batch_id','rejected_pct','inspection_result']], on='batch_id', how='left')
attr['is_rejected']=attr['inspection_result'].eq('REJECTED')
attr['thr']=attr['product_id'].map(prod)
attr['over_thr']=attr['rejected_pct']-attr['thr']
base=attr.groupby('product_id')['is_rejected'].mean()
techprod=attr.groupby(['technician_id','product_id']).agg(batches=('batch_id','size'), rejects=('is_rejected','sum')).reset_index()
techprod['pval']=techprod.apply(lambda r: binomtest(int(r.rejects), int(r.batches), float(base[r.product_id]), alternative='greater').pvalue if r.rejects>0 else 1.0, axis=1)
interval=attr.groupby(['technician_id','work_order_id','product_id']).agg(rejects=('is_rejected','sum'), batches=('batch_id','size'), max_over=('over_thr','max')).reset_index()
selected=[]
for _,r in techprod.iterrows():
    tech,prodid=r['technician_id'],r['product_id']
    sub=interval[(interval['technician_id']==tech)&(interval['product_id']==prodid)]
    cond1=(r['rejects']>=2 and sub.loc[sub['rejects']>0,'work_order_id'].nunique()>=2 and r['pval']<0.05)
    cond2=((sub['rejects']>=2).any())
    cond3=(((sub['rejects']>=1) & (sub['max_over']>0.02)).any())
    if cond1 or cond2 or cond3:
        selected.append((tech, prodid))
sel=pd.DataFrame(selected, columns=['tech','product'])
rej=attr[attr['is_rejected']].copy()
rej_sel=rej.merge(sel, left_on=['technician_id','product_id'], right_on=['tech','product'])
conf=rej_sel.groupby('technician_id').agg(total_rejects=('batch_id','size'), work_orders=('work_order_id','nunique')).reset_index()
conf=conf[(conf['total_rejects']>=3)&(conf['work_orders']>=2)].sort_values('technician_id')
print(conf.to_string(index=False))
