# test targeted rule approximating manual selection
import pandas as pd
from pathlib import Path
from scipy.stats import binomtest
records=[]
for p in sorted(Path('/app/raw_service_reports').rglob('*_service.txt')):
    rec={}
    for line in p.read_text().splitlines():
        if ': ' in line:
            k,v=line.split(': ',1)
            rec[k.strip()] = v.strip()
    records.append(rec)
svc=pd.DataFrame(records).rename(columns={'DAY':'day','WORK ORDER':'work_order_id','MACHINE':'machine_id','TECHNICIAN':'technician_id','STARTED':'started','COMPLETED':'completed'})
svc['day']=svc['day'].astype(int)
def t2m(s):
    h,m=map(int,s.split(':'))
    return h*60+m
svc['start_ts']=(svc['day']-1)*1440+svc['started'].map(t2m)
svc['completed_ts']=(svc['day']-1)*1440+svc['completed'].map(t2m)
svc=svc.sort_values(['machine_id','completed_ts','work_order_id']).reset_index(drop=True)
svc['next_start_ts']=svc.groupby('machine_id')['start_ts'].shift(-1)

b=pd.read_csv('/app/production_batches.csv')
a=pd.read_csv('/app/machine_assignment_log.csv')
q=pd.read_csv('/app/quality_inspections.csv')
prod=pd.read_csv('/app/products.csv').set_index('product_id')['quality_rejection_threshold_pct'].to_dict()

jobs=b.merge(a[['job_id','machine_id','start_time']], on=['job_id','machine_id'], how='left')
jobs['start_ts']=(jobs['production_day']-1)*1440+jobs['start_time'].map(t2m)
parts=[]
for m, dfm in jobs.groupby('machine_id', sort=False):
    svcm=svc[svc['machine_id']==m][['work_order_id','technician_id','completed_ts','next_start_ts','day']].sort_values('completed_ts')
    dfm=dfm.sort_values('start_ts').copy()
    if svcm.empty:
        for c in ['work_order_id','technician_id','completed_ts','next_start_ts','maint_day']:
            dfm[c]=pd.NA
    else:
        dfm=pd.merge_asof(dfm, svcm.rename(columns={'day':'maint_day'}), left_on='start_ts', right_on='completed_ts', direction='backward')
    parts.append(dfm)
attr=pd.concat(parts, ignore_index=True)
attr['link_ok']=attr['completed_ts'].notna() & (attr['start_ts']>attr['completed_ts']) & (attr['next_start_ts'].isna() | (attr['start_ts']<attr['next_start_ts']))
attr=attr[attr['link_ok']].merge(q[['batch_id','rejected_pct','inspection_result']], on='batch_id', how='left')
attr['is_rejected']=attr['inspection_result'].eq('REJECTED')
attr['thr']=attr['product_id'].map(prod)
attr['over_thr']=attr['rejected_pct']-attr['thr']
base=attr.groupby('product_id')['is_rejected'].mean()
techprod=attr.groupby(['technician_id','product_id']).agg(batches=('batch_id','size'), rejects=('is_rejected','sum')).reset_index()
techprod['pval']=techprod.apply(lambda r: binomtest(int(r.rejects), int(r.batches), float(base[r.product_id]), alternative='greater').pvalue if r.rejects>0 else 1.0, axis=1)
interval=attr.groupby(['technician_id','work_order_id','product_id']).agg(rejects=('is_rejected','sum'), batches=('batch_id','size'), max_over=('over_thr','max')).reset_index()
selected=[]
for _,r in techprod.iterrows():
    tech,prodid=r['technician_id'],r['product_id']
    sub=interval[(interval['technician_id']==tech)&(interval['product_id']==prodid)]
    condA=((sub['max_over']>0.02) & (sub['rejects']>=1)).any()
    condB=((sub['rejects']>=2) & ((sub['rejects']/sub['batches'])>=2/3)).any()
    condC=(r['rejects']>=2 and sub.loc[sub['rejects']>0,'work_order_id'].nunique()>=2 and r['pval']<0.01 and (((sub['rejects']/sub['batches'])>=0.5) | (sub['max_over']>0.015)).any())
    if condA or condB or condC:
        selected.append((tech, prodid, int(r['rejects']), int(sub.loc[sub['rejects']>0,'work_order_id'].nunique()), condA, condB, condC))
sel=pd.DataFrame(selected, columns=['tech','product','rejects','wos','condA','condB','condC'])
rej=attr[attr['is_rejected']].copy()
rej_sel=rej.merge(sel[['tech','product']], left_on=['technician_id','product_id'], right_on=['tech','product'])
conf=rej_sel.groupby('technician_id').agg(total_rejects=('batch_id','size'), work_orders=('work_order_id','nunique')).reset_index()
conf=conf[(conf['total_rejects']>=3)&(conf['work_orders']>=2)].sort_values('technician_id')
print(conf.to_string(index=False))
print('\nsel pairs')
print(sel[sel['tech'].isin(conf['technician_id'])].sort_values(['tech','product']).to_string(index=False))

svc['completed_ts']=(svc['day']-1)*1440+svc['completed'].map(t2m)
svc=svc.sort_values(['machine_id','completed_ts','work_order_id']).reset_index(drop=True)
svc['next_start_ts']=svc.groupby('machine_id')['start_ts'].shift(-1)

b=pd.read_csv('/app/production_batches.csv')
a=pd.read_csv('/app/machine_assignment_log.csv')
q=pd.read_csv('/app/quality_inspections.csv')

jobs=b.merge(a[['job_id','machine_id','start_time']], on=['job_id','machine_id'], how='left')
jobs['start_ts']=(jobs['production_day']-1)*1440+jobs['start_time'].map(t2m)
parts=[]
for m, dfm in jobs.groupby('machine_id', sort=False):
    svcm=svc[svc['machine_id']==m][['work_order_id','technician_id','completed_ts','next_start_ts','day']].sort_values('completed_ts')
    dfm=dfm.sort_values('start_ts').copy()
    if svcm.empty:
        for c in ['work_order_id','technician_id','completed_ts','next_start_ts','maint_day']:
            dfm[c]=pd.NA
    else:
        dfm=pd.merge_asof(dfm, svcm.rename(columns={'day':'maint_day'}), left_on='start_ts', right_on='completed_ts', direction='backward')
    parts.append(dfm)
attr=pd.concat(parts, ignore_index=True)
attr['link_ok']=attr['completed_ts'].notna() & (attr['start_ts']>attr['completed_ts']) & (attr['next_start_ts'].isna() | (attr['start_ts']<attr['next_start_ts']))
attr=attr[attr['link_ok']].merge(q[['batch_id','rejected_pct','defect_code','inspection_result']], on='batch_id', how='left')

df=attr[(attr['technician_id']=='TECH_016')&(attr['product_id']=='P_020')].sort_values('start_ts')
print(df[['production_day','start_time','machine_id','work_order_id','rejected_pct','defect_code','inspection_result']].to_string(index=False))
